'''zhajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:thalprzewalskiinone|thalprzewalskiinone]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-j-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:thalprzewalskiinone|thalprzewalskiinone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhajaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæjækæth|zhæjækæth]] || [[word:zhæjækæj|zhæjækæj]] || [[word:zhæjækæsh|zhæjækæsh]] || [[word:zhæjækæ|zhæjækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhajajakath|zhajajakath]] || [[word:zhajajakaj|zhajajakaj]] || [[word:zhajajakash|zhajajakash]] || [[word:zhajajaka|zhajajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhajakath|zhajakath]] || [[word:zhajakaj|zhajakaj]] || [[word:zhajakash|zhajakash]] || [[word:zhajaka|zhajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhajafkath|zhajafkath]] || [[word:zhajafkaj|zhajafkaj]] || [[word:zhajafkash|zhajafkash]] || [[word:zhajafkaf|zhajafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhajakatha|zhajakatha]] || [[word:zhajakaja|zhajakaja]] || [[word:zhajakasha|zhajakasha]] || [[word:zhajakaka|zhajakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhajakath|zhajakath]] || [[word:zhajakaj|zhajakaj]] || [[word:zhajakash|zhajakash]] || [[word:zhajaka|zhajaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhajakathal|zhajakathal]] || [[word:zhajakajal|zhajakajal]] || [[word:zhajakashal|zhajakashal]] || [[word:zhajakakal|zhajakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhajakathatha|zhajakathatha]] || [[word:zhajakajaja|zhajakajaja]] || [[word:zhajakashasha|zhajakashasha]] || [[word:zhajakaka|zhajakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhajakathan|zhajakathan]] || [[word:zhajakajan|zhajakajan]] || [[word:zhajakashan|zhajakashan]] || [[word:zhajakakan|zhajakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhajakathaoro|zhajakathaoro]] || [[word:zhajakajaoro|zhajakajaoro]] || [[word:zhajakashaoro|zhajakashaoro]] || [[word:zhajakakaoro|zhajakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
